rationale: Section 11.37(g)(1) cross-references Section 11.13 generally but does not depend on the specific dollar amount of the homestead exemption. Changing the exemption amount from $140,000 to $200,000 has no operative effect on §11.37.
quote:
a person may not claim an exemption under Subsection (b)(2) for property:
(1) for which the person claims an exemption under Section 11.13;
_note: No conflict. §11.37 references §11.13 by section number only, not by dollar threshold.
